headline: Disney CEO Shift To Josh D'Amaro Puts Focus On Streaming And Parks
summary: Walt Disney (NYSE:DIS) has appointed Josh D'Amaro as CEO, succeeding Bob Iger. The transition is accompanied by departures of several senior leaders, including Chief Communications Officer Kristina Schake. Management changes align with a shift in focus on streaming consolidation, international theme park expansion, and technology driven initiatives. For you as an investor, this is a leadership handover at one of the most followed media and entertainment names globally, spanning film...

headline: Martin Shkreli's New Computing Firm Is Betting It Can Upend Nvidia's Business Model
summary: “Pharma Bro” Martin Shkreli has published a detailed bull case for photonic computing Thursday , sayinghe is now actively working at Q/C Technologies Inc., the micro-cap firm he first invested in last December. What Shkreli Is Arguing Shkreli’s Substack essay, titled “Photonic Computing: The Final AI Hardware Frontier,” lays out a simple thesis: GPUs from Nvidia Corp. spend roughly 99% of their time doing one thing, matrix multiplication.
